title: Business bowling league almost at final round
description: SPORT NEWS - Round 5 of the Lew Geffen...
bodyText:
SPORT NEWS - Round 5 of the Lew Geffen Sotheby’s International Realty Spring Business League was held at the George Bowling Club on Thursday 14 November. The Alley Angels of NuSkinnovation enjoyed their win against the Dotsure team, and were the session winners for round 5.

With only one more round to go, the Old Mutual Green Machine team are currently in first position in the cup section on 56 points, following their round 5 win over sponsors Lew Geffen Sotheby’s.

Lew Geffen Sotheby’s International Realty are in second place with 52 points, and York High School is hot on their heels in third place with 51 points.

The George High Rollerzz are currently leading the plate section with 45 points, with A Chimes and Van Wyk Attorneys in second place on 42 points and VDM Attorneys in third place on 40 points.

The final round takes place on Thursday, 28 November and is sure to be a thrilling conclusion to the Spring Business League.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
